ocr_findings.description: '試験にはつしかえる！' in OCR line 7; image shows '試験にはコレが出る！'. Recurring mascot icon misread, also missing '出る' portion — but exam tip content in the bullet below is correctly captured.
OCR line 11 '第13章 データベース' appears to be chapter tab text from the right margin of the image, which was read as a separate paragraph. This is a reading-order artifact from the vertical sidebar text.

reviewer_notes: Sparse page — only two paragraphs of prose about ロック (locking) and an exam-tip box at top, with remainder blank. All substantive text is correctly captured. The mascot heading misread is a recurring cosmetic issue. The chapter sidebar tab text intruded as a stray line. Label is content (continuation of 排他制御 section).
